overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (Resident Evil Village) showing a walk through a snowy mountainous landscape. The player approaches a large wooden windmill, crosses a bridge, and continues along a cliffside path overlooking a frozen coastline. The atmosphere is cold and desolate with overcast skies and heavy snow cover.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain valley with pine forest

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the snowy valley toward a distant windmill structure

entered.detail: expansive snow-covered valley between rocky mountain slopes
dense evergreen trees covered in snow
snow-covered pine trees on the right slope
large wooden windmill with rotating blades visible in the distance
thick snow covering the path and surrounding terrain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking through a wide snowy mountain valley. Dense pine forests line both sides of the path while a large windmill structure stands visible in the distant center. The overcast sky casts a diffuse cool light over the snow-covered terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge crossing near windmill structure

events.description: exiting dense forest into open area near the windmill structure

agents.ego_description: approaching and crossing a wooden bridge near the large windmill structure

entered.detail: snow-covered wooden bridge crossing a small ravine

segments.scene_description: The terrain opens up as the camera approaches the massive windmill structure. The dense pine forests fall away to reveal a wooden bridge crossing. The windmill, previously distant, now dominates the center of the frame as the camera moves closer and crosses the bridge.

events.description: windmill passes out of view as coastal cliff and ocean come into sight
ocean and rocky coastline become visible below the cliff edge

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrow cliffside path with the ocean visible to the left

entered.detail: expansive body of water visible beyond the cliff edge
steep snow-covered rock wall on the right side of the path
jagged rock formations along the shoreline below

segments.scene_description: Moving past the windmill, the camera turns along a narrow cliffside path. The snowy valley gives way to a dramatic coastal view with the ocean visible to the left. The path follows the cliff edge with steep rock walls on one side and a drop to the rocky shore below on the other.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal overlook with frozen shoreline

agents.ego_description: continuing along the coastal cliff path overlooking the frozen water and shoreline

entered.detail: snow and ice-covered beach area at the water's edge
tall rock outcroppings rising from the water

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the coastal cliff with a clear view of the frozen shoreline below. The camera moves past offshore rock formations and looks down at the ice-covered beach, maintaining a steady pace along the narrow snow-covered path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a secluded snowy mountain valley toward a dramatic, frozen coastal cliffside. It begins by walking through a wide valley flanked by dense pine forests under a diffuse, overcast sky, with a large windmill visible in the distance. As the camera approaches, the forests fall away to reveal a wooden bridge that leads directly toward the now-dominating windmill structure. The scene then shifts as the camera moves past the windmill and turns onto a narrow cliffside path, where the enclosed valley opens up to reveal a vast ocean to the left. Finally, the path follows the steep rock walls along the cliff's edge, overlooking offshore rock formations and a frozen shoreline below.
